menu.about_description: A strategic partner in specialty chemicals, leveraging two decades of manufacturing excellence to serve global supply chains with precision, integrity, and operational consistency.
menu.markets_description: Empowering pivotal global industries with high-performance chemical solutions, engineered for mission-critical applications and diverse market requirements.
menu.products_description: A portfolio of precision-synthesized intermediates and specialty derivatives, manufactured under rigorous quality protocols to meet the strict compliance standards of regulated international markets.
menu.sustainability_description: Championing responsible chemistry and environmental stewardship, we integrate sustainable practices to minimize ecological impact and drive long-term value.
menu.media_description: Access corporate announcements, industry thought leadership, and strategic updates regarding our latest developments and global initiatives.
menu.careers_description: Fostering a high-performance culture of innovation. We empower exceptional talent to drive professional excellence and contribute to our vision of global leadership.

spotlight.top_text: Introducing Avid Organics New Brand Identity
spotlight.bottom_text: Avid Organics has achieved REACH registration for its Glycolic Acid portfolio.
